description: Add support for generating thumbnails from WebP images. The system should use the official Go WebP decoder to process WebP files and create thumbnails in PNG format since the current imaging library doesn't support WebP. The implementation should gracefully handle any decoding failures by falling back to using the original full-size image as the thumbnail.
functional_requirements: Import and use the official Go WebP decoder package to handle WebP image decoding
Modify the thumbnail generation logic to detect and process WebP image files alongside existing formats
Generate thumbnails from WebP images in PNG format (since the imaging library doesn't support WebP)
Implement proper error handling so that if WebP decoding fails, the system falls back to using the original full-size image as the thumbnail
Maintain backward compatibility with existing image formats and thumbnail generation behavior
